title: Garlicky Gooey Mediterranean Turkey Neck Braise
description: A hearty mediterranean-inspired dish featuring turkey neck, with a rich, garlicky flavor and a gooey, savory sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner. Simply braise the turkey neck in a flavorful liquid with aromatics, then serve over rice or noodles.

ingredients.name: garlic-infused lemon juice
ingredients.notes: see note on garlic-infused lemon juice below

instructions: In a small mortar and pestle, pound 4 cloves of garlic-infused lemon juice (see note on garlic-infused lemon juice below) into a smooth paste.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the turkey necks and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic-infused lemon juice paste, lemon juice, white wine vinegar, chicken broth, thyme, oregano, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the turkey necks for 2 hours, or until tender and falling off the bone.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the fresh parsley.
Serve the turkey necks and sauce over rice or noodles.

Note: To make garlic-infused lemon juice, combine 1 cup of lemon juice with 4 cloves of minced garlic in a small bowl. Let sit at room temperature for at least 30 minutes to allow the garlic to infuse into the lemon juice.
